headline: Paramount Stock Heads for Lowest Level Since 2009. You Don’t Need a New Headline to Know What’s Going On.
summary: Shares of Paramount Skydance have fallen for nine straight days, losing nearly 27% over this period.

headline: Market Madness: Why JPMorgan, McDonald's are slam dunk stock picks
summary: Tipping off Yahoo Finance's "Market Madness" bracket tournament, Winthrop Capital CIO Adam Coons joins Julie Hyman to make the case for the first round of corporate match-ups, which includes JPMorgan Chase (JPM) vs. TJX (TJX) and McDonald's (MCD) vs. Disney (DIS).
